message:
rich_rust-g92: validate Color System against RICH_SPEC Section 1

Added 17 comprehensive spec validation tests covering:
- ColorTriplet methods (hex, rgb, normalized)
- ColorSystem/ColorType enum values match spec (0-4, 1-4)
- Case-insensitive parsing
- Color number boundaries (0-15 Standard, 16-255 EightBit)
- RGB format whitespace handling
- Standard/Windows/EightBit palette exact values
- 6x6x6 cube formula verification
- ANSI codes for all color types
- Grayscale detection (saturation < 0.15 threshold)
- get_truecolor conversions
- LRU cache functionality

All spec requirements validated - implementation matches RICH_SPEC.md §1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
